title: NextStep
desc: A motivational goal-tracking app that helps users take small, actionable steps toward personal growth. Clean, encouraging UI built to promote daily progress.

title: Nerd Street CRM
desc: Nerd Street CRM is a donor relationship tool for nonprofits that centralizes donor records, donations, and engagement.

title: PlayerLobby (Coming Soon)
desc: A community-first multiplayer lobby and matchmaking dashboard for players to find, join, and organize casual and competitive matches.

title: Halo (Coming Soon)
desc: A lightweight analytics and presence tracker for live events and streamers — real-time viewer stats, chat highlights, and session summaries.

title: EchoBoard (Coming Soon)
desc: A small collaborative whiteboard and brainstorming tool for quick idea capture and lightweight team sketches.

title: ClearCents
desc: Master your money as a student. Track income and expenses, understand your spending patterns, and get AI-powered insights to build healthier financial habits over time.
